title: Client Profile
description: Profile used to score trend relevance for a client

product_description.description: What the company/product does in 1-2 sentences

expertise.description: Topics the client has deep expertise and credibility in

titles.description: Job titles of target audience (e.g., 'General Counsel', 'Legal Ops Manager')

company_types.description: Types of companies they sell to (e.g., 'Mid-market SaaS', 'Enterprise')

pain_points.description: Problems the ICP faces that the client solves

content_themes.description: Recurring themes in their content (extracted from transcripts or questionnaire)

tone.description: How they come across (e.g., 'approachable expert', 'provocative thought leader')

avoids.description: Topics or angles they avoid (competitors, politics, etc.)

industry_terms.description: Industry jargon and related terms (for search hints, not strict filtering)

sample_posts.description: Examples of past posts or content for style reference
